overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a lone character in western attire walking through a moody, stormy harbor dock at night. The character navigates wooden piers, passes warehouses and cargo storage areas, and moves through covered walkways illuminated by warm lamplight against dark, overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden dock plaza with scattered warehouses

events.description: character turns left around the corner of a wooden warehouse building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open dock area, navigating around buildings and passing under street lamps

entered.detail: cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glow illuminating the wet wooden dock
large wooden industrial building with lit windows and gabled roof
stacked wooden shipping crates and boxes scattered along the dock
wet wooden pier decking reflecting the warm lamplight

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open wooden dock area at night, passing under the warm glow of street lamps. The wet planks reflect the light as the character turns left around a warehouse building, with cargo crates visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo storage yard with stacked crates and barrels

events.description: passing the green COTTON CO warehouse building with painted signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages between stacked cargo crates and wooden barrels in the storage yard

entered.detail: green wooden warehouse building with COTTON CO signage and weathered paint
tall stacks of wooden shipping crates creating narrow pathways
cylindrical wooden barrels grouped near the crate stacks

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a cargo storage area filled with stacked wooden crates and barrels. The COTTON CO warehouse dominates the left side as the character walks through the narrow passages between the cargo stacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront shacks and narrow alley between buildings

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between closely spaced wooden buildings
approaching covered pier structure with brighter interior lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront past small wooden shacks, then turning into a narrow dark alley between buildings

entered.detail: small wooden shack with weathered siding located along the water's edge
wooden railing along the edge of the dock overlooking the water
dark narrow passage between tall wooden warehouse buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks past small waterfront shacks along the dock's edge, with wooden railings visible on the left overlooking the water. The path narrows into a dark alley between buildings before approaching a covered pier structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pier walkway with overhead wooden roof structure

events.description: entering the covered pier structure with overhead wooden beams and artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed covered walkway illuminated by overhead electric lamps, moving toward the pier's end

entered.detail: wooden beam roof structure covering the walkway, blocking the sky
electric lamps mounted on the ceiling beams providing warm illumination
long covered corridor with wooden walls and ceiling extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pier walkway with a wooden roof structure that blocks the night sky. Overhead electric lamps illuminate the enclosed corridor as the character walks toward the end of the pier, with wooden crate stacks visible along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody harbor dock at night, transitioning from open, lamp-lit piers into a confined, covered walkway. It begins with the character walking across wet wooden planks that reflect the warm glow of street lamps before turning left around a warehouse past scattered cargo crates. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a dense cargo storage area dominated by the Cotton Co warehouse, where the character navigates tight passages between stacked barrels and crates. The camera then follows the character past small waterfront shacks and wooden railings overlooking the dark water, moving through a dim alleyway that leads toward a pier structure. Finally, the environment closes in as the character enters a covered walkway, where a wooden roof blocks the night sky and overhead electric lamps illuminate the enclosed corridor.
